description_long: This is a large, modern suburban house with a light gray gable roof and white exterior walls. The property features a long, curved driveway leading to a detached garage and a landscaped front yard with trees and shrubs. The main building has multiple rooflines, a prominent central entryway, and numerous symmetrically arranged windows. At the rear, there is a spacious backyard with a rectangular swimming pool and patio area. The house appears to have two stories, with the upper level set back from the lower, creating a tiered effect. Architectural details include a covered porch at the entrance and a mix of traditional and contemporary design elements.
description: A large, two-story modern suburban house with a gable roof, detached garage, landscaped yard, and backyard pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, curved driveway, detached garage, and landscaped front yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway, and the backyard pool area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the swimming pool, patio, and the tiered structure of the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the garage, driveway, and the side elevation of the house.
attribute_entryway_design: Central covered porch with steps, double doors, and decorative columns
